evidence.source_title: Brachytherapy boost in anal canal cancer - A GEC ESTRO PDR task force meta-analysis.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 36785565. 2023/01/30 00:00. BACKGROUND: In February 2021, the Brachytherapy department of the Lorraine 
Cancer Institute began a transition away from pulsed dose rate (PDR) towards 
high dose rate (HDR) brachytherapy, for gynaecological cancer, cancers of the 
oral cavity, oropharynx and anal canal, penile cancer and sarcoma. We describe 
our experience here; for the benefit of other brachytherapy departments that may 
be envisaging a similar transition in care.
MEDICAL VIEWPOINT: Fra
